subcodes.first_line: O thou who fosterest love, this narrow and darksome realm of dust, and man, wandering and without shelter or rest - therefore be thou wise of heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهرپرور این خاکدان تنگ و تار و انسان آواره و بیسر و سامان لهذا دانا دل
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
